_description: Maps page_source/<term>/<stem>.html to York SIS static timetable HTML. Full URL = base_url + year_prefix + faculty_code + '.html'. The local term folder name (e.g. fall-winter-2026-2027) does not have to match York's FW#### prefix—set year_prefix to whatever filenames exist on apps1.sis.yorku.ca.

fall-winter-2026-2027._year_prefix_note: Same SIS filenames as current published timetables (FW2026*.html). When York posts new files (e.g. FW2027*.html), update year_prefix here.
